## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Release metadata
- [ ] Roadmap or governance
- [ ] Other

## Safety Review

- [ ] This PR does not add generated data, model checkpoints, credentials, private paths, or sensitive security details.
- [ ] Public-facing claims are conservative and verifiable.

## Checklist

- [ ] Links are valid
- [ ] Terminology is consistent with the roadmap
- [ ] Release dates or claims are marked as planned, current, or internally evaluated where appropriate
